blockers: Task tool returned synchronous results with no background agent id; launch_started logged without agent-id.
consensus_notes: Teardown/stop flows exist but lack robust validation (pid reuse risk, no signal trap, smoke tests not asserting stop).

key_findings: PID capture relies on process-tree heuristic and 5s delay.
Teardown terminates recorded PID without ownership validation or process-group cleanup.
Auto-merge defaults to yes on timeout.
No signal/EXIT trap; partial exit uses all-dead grace but exit code same as success.
Smoke test lacks explicit stop verification; relies on trap termination.
Metaswarm session termination is best-effort with no validation.
tmux sessions detached by default; --no-attach suppresses auto-attach.
Docs state detach keeps agents running until explicit teardown.
Auto-attach leaves /tmp task/attach files; CI leaves /tmp/install-ci.sh.
